MeasurementToolMetadata.Notes: We only include item-level data, we do not include summary scores due to the complexities in how puberty is staged.
MeasurementToolMetadata.Instructions: Because our research is about how children develop into teenagers and young adults, it is important for us to know where you are in terms of your physical development. You can complete this short questionnaire on your own. I will hand this off to you so I can't see your responses but if you have any questions, please feel free to ask. When you reach the final screen after the questionnaire, please ask me for instructions.

tanner_boy_1.Description: Would you say that your growth in height:

Levels.1: Has not yet begun to spurt ("spurt" means faster growth than usual)

tanner_boy_2.Description: Have you noticed any skin changes, especially pimples?

Levels.1: Skin has not yet started changing

tanner_boy_3.Description: Have you begun to grow hair on your face?

Levels.1: Facial hair has not yet started growning
Levels.2: Facial hair has barely started growing
Levels.3: Facial hair growth has definitely started

tanner_boy_4.Description: What about the growth of body hair ("body hair" means hairany place other than the head, such as under the arms)?

Levels.1: Has not yet started to grow

tanner_boy_5.Description: Have you noticed a deepening of your voice?

Levels.1: Voice has not yet started changing

tanner_boy_6.Description: The following pictures show different stages of pubic hair growth. A boy goes through each of the five stages shown. Please look at each picture and read the sentence below it. Select the option that is closest to your stage. Do not look at penis size.
